title: bulbine torta
intro: Bulbine torta, also known as Burn Aloe, is a succulent plant species native to the Eastern Cape province of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include wound healing, skin soothing, and the treatment of various ailments such as burns, eczema, and sunburns. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Bulbine torta can be used to make a topical gel or cream for external application, and the extracts can also be used in tinctures and infusions for internal use.
